name: Asus Prime B860M-K CSM D5
highlights: ASUS PRIME B860M-K-CSM is a reliable micro-ATX motherboard designed for Intel® Core™ Ultra Processors (Series 2) on LGA1851, featuring DDR5 memory support up to 128GB, PCIe 5
Built with ASUS 5X Protection III, Aura Sync RGB, and Q-Design for easy DIY, it’s perfect for both performance builders and professionals seeking durability and efficiency
description: Asus Prime B860M-K CSM D5 Price in Pakistan Category Details Model PRIME B860M-K-CSM CPU Support Intel® Core™ Ultra Processors (Series 2), LGA1851 Chipset Intel® B860 Chipset Memory 2× DDR5 DIMM slots, up to 128GB, up to 8800+ MT/s (OC), Dual Channel Memory Features Intel® XMP, ASUS AEMP III, On-Die ECC support Graphics Output 1× DisplayPort (4K@60Hz), 1× HDMI 2.1 (4K@60Hz) Expansion Slots 1× PCIe 4.0 x16, 2× PCIe 4.0 x1 Storage Support 2× M.2 (PCIe 5.0 x4 + 4.0 x4), 4× SATA 6Gb/s RAID Support R
